privileged_info_summary: The task sets up a banking-service Java Maven project with 17 test cases (not 15 as claimed) distributed across three test classes: AccountTest (5 tests), TransactionServiceTest (4 tests), and ExtraTest (8 tests). The task requires migrating from JUnit 4 (junit:junit:4.12) to JUnit 5 (org.junit.jupiter:junit-jupiter:5.9.2), updating imports from org.junit.* to org.junit.jupiter.api.*, and refactoring annotations (@Before→@BeforeEach, @Test(expected=...)→assertThrows, etc.). All metadata claims are correct except expected_tests_count, which should be 17, not 15.
